title: Funded Trading Onchain? Inside Propr’s System (Hyperliquid)
summary_title: Proper's transparent prop firm on Hyperliquid: 9.5% pass rate, AI agents, and radical disclosure
summary_description: Founder Lou discusses building crypto's most transparent prop firm with open APIs for AI agents and a public P&L dashboard.

key_moments.label: Lou's background: traditional finance to crypto founder
Banned from Bybit, fell in love with Hyperliquid
What prop firms do: evaluations, capital access, efficiency vs leverage
Transparency as moat: public pass rates, margins, revenue on dashboard
AI agent-first infrastructure: 33% of users are agents with funded accounts
Pass rates: 9.5% overall, 10.14% one-step, 7.69% two-step challenges
Open-sourced algorithm determines A-book vs B-book based on Sharpe ratio and consistency
Proper Points reward early users; token-only fundraising to align value

pull_quote: Two CEOs of very large prop firms told me this approach is very wrong and I'm not welcome in the industry. That tells me I'm doing something different.
